global.description: The ad features a clear promotional message with a focus on a flash sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale for VantaStyle.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: UGC icons
elements.description: Two outlined square icons representing user-generated content, placed in the top left corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: Text label 'VantaStyle UGC' in a modern font, positioned above the icons.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' in a prominent position at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: UGC title
elements.description: Text 'VantaStyle UGC' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Install button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Install now' in a rounded rectangle shape, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale label
elements.description: Text 'SALE' in a bold font with a contrasting background, positioned at the top right corner.
